news.title: Police investigation closes Williams Street at 10th in midtown Atlanta
news.summary: A police investigation has closed part of midtown Atlanta as officers examine an incident on 10th Street,

news.title: Local FOP fights to save Stone Mountain Park Police Department
news.summary: The future of the Stone Mountain Park Police Department is up in the air after reports surfaced that officers are being told to look for new jobs.

news.title: DeKalb County deputy arrested, fired after investigation into misuse of license plate camera system
news.summary: "The misuse of law enforcement technology or confidential information for any unauthorized purpose is a serious breach of the public's trust," the sheriff said.

news.title: Shelia Ann Nichols: Georgia woman ID-ed in 1983 Everglades murder mystery
news.summary: Florida investigators identified a teenager from Decatur who vanished in 1983 and was found dead in the Florida Everglades.

news.title: 'A coward move': 75-year-old grandma shot handing out baked goods
news.summary: A 75-year-old woman remains hospitalized after she was shot in the back while handing out baked goods at an East Point gas station.
